sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ زَرْعَ مَلَايِينِ الْأَشْجَارِ فِي الْمَنَاطِقِ الصَّحْرَاوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je odlučila zasaditi milione stabala u pustinjskim područjima.
sentences.translationEn: The government has decided to plant millions of trees in desert areas.

sentences.arabic: يَهْدِفُ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعُ إِلَى مُكَافَحَةِ التَّغَيُّرِ الْمَنَاخِيِّ وَتَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْهَوَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj projekt ima za cilj borbu protiv klimatskih promjena i poboljšanje kvalitete zraka.
sentences.translationEn: This project aims to combat climate change and improve air quality.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ آلَافُ الْمُتَطَوِّعِينَ فِي حَفْلَةِ الزَّرْعِ الْأُولَى.
sentences.translation: Hiljade volontera učestvovalo je na prvoj sadnji.
sentences.translationEn: Thousands of volunteers participated in the first planting event.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ وَزِيرُ الْبِيئَةِ إِنَّ الْأَشْجَارَ سَتُغَطِّي مَسَاحَاتٍ شَاسِعَةً خِلَالَ السَّنَوَاتِ الْعَشْرِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ministar okoliša rekao je da će stabla pokriti ogromne površine tokom narednih deset godina.
sentences.translationEn: The environment minister said that the trees will cover vast areas over the next ten years.

sentences.arabic: يَأْمَلُ الْمَسْؤُولُونَ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ الْهَوَاءُ أَنْظَفَ وَالْمَنَاخُ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Zvaničnici se nadaju da će zrak postati čišći i klima bolja.
sentences.translationEn: Officials hope that the air will become cleaner and the climate will improve.
